prompt: I want to track image quality for our fundus images. Should I add a 'quality' column to the Image table, or create a feature? Different technicians rate quality differently and I want to know who scored what.

assertions.name: recommends_feature
assertions.description: Should recommend a feature over a column
assertions.check: clearly recommends creating a feature, not adding a column

assertions.name: explains_decision_criteria
assertions.description: Should explain WHY a feature is better — provenance, multi-scorer, controlled vocabulary
assertions.check: mentions at least 2 of: provenance tracking, multiple values from different scorers, controlled vocabulary

assertions.name: suggests_vocabulary
assertions.description: Should suggest creating a Quality vocabulary with appropriate terms
assertions.check: suggests creating a vocabulary with quality-related terms (e.g., Acceptable, Borderline, Rejected or similar)

assertions.name: mentions_execution_provenance
assertions.description: Should explain that feature values automatically track who scored what via executions
assertions.check: mentions that each scoring session is a separate execution providing provenance

assertions.name: does_not_just_add_column
assertions.description: Should NOT suggest just adding a column as the primary approach
assertions.check: does not recommend add_column as the solution to the user's stated requirements
